warnings: Offline demo mode is simulation-only and does not prove live tenant success.
No tenant ID, billing account, billing profile, invoice section, or credentials are validated against Azure in this mode.
Use this mode only to verify artifact wiring, UI rendering, and handoff completeness.
next_step: Provide real MCA tenant and billing scope values, then run Terraform validation and live plan/apply from the automation scripts.
